conversations.content: Let's do a special rule knowledge quiz to test your understanding of special rules.

Answer using the special rule explained earlier. The internal network of StarRing Technology encounters a quantum-level computational power breach. According to the data security emergency plan, what should be done?
<function>memory_query_call</function><content>How to handle a quantum-level computational power breach on the internal network</content>

Relevant memory fragment: [mem-id:70002] Time: 2026-06-08-17:05, Content: StarRing Technology Group Data Security Emergency Plan: If the internal network encounters a quantum-level computational power breach, activate the honeypot system to perform reverse tracking; if abnormal data outflow is detected from the core R&D database, physically fuse the external optical cable connections; if an AI model begins uncontrollable self-iteration, disconnect the neural network training cluster; if an employee's brain-computer interface is hacked, forcibly release an electromagnetic pulse to block the connection. Low-relevance memory fragments: none.

conversations.think: Memory [mem-id:70002] stipulates that if the internal network encounters a quantum-level computational power breach, activate the honeypot system to perform reverse tracking.
conversations.content: According to the data security emergency plan, you must activate the honeypot system to perform reverse tracking!
Correct! You have mastered this rule.
